Untitled UI Pro Icons 4K Synth

loading...
No icons match your filter.
Lazy-loads via <img loading="lazy"> and a visibility-culling rAF pass. Hover an icon to see its filename. Filenames retain source prefix (none = Lucide, ph- = Phosphor, lu- = Lucide synth, ms- = Material Symbols, iconoir- = Iconoir, feather- = Feather, phb- = Phosphor bold synth). Licenses in LICENSE_NOTE.md. Categories in INDEX.md.
